items.title: Sri Lanka prison riots leave 26 dead and more than 100 injured
items.summary: The two days of violence at Negombo Prison are the worst prison riots in the country in years.

items.title: Blind People Offered Hope of Seeing Again After Stem Cell Breakthrough Remakes Retinal Blood Vessels
items.summary: Blind people have been offered fresh hope of seeing again after lab-grown cells restored retinal function in mice. When injected into mice with retinal disease, the special retinal blood cells integra…
